Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 685}Are you trying to hit on me? Oh, you're just taking orders... *sigh*[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 685}Actually, scratch that. I'll go with my original order.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 685}Are you trying to hit on me this time? Oh, you're just checking my order...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 685}Actually, scratch that. I'll go with my original order.[n]{f 1 1}
